name: Stripe
title_tag: Integrate Stripe with Synup to Automate Your Review Management Process
detailed_paragraph:
Stripe + Synup

Revolutionize Reviews with Stripe + Synup: Seamlessly collect and enhance customer feedback through automated prompts, customized experiences, and insightful follow-ups in perfect harmony with your payment transactions.

What is Stripe?

Stripe is a leading online payment processor, enabling businesses to securely accept and manage transactions over the Internet with robust technical and fraud prevention infrastructure. Its user-friendly design allows for seamless management of online payments and subscriptions, making it a preferred choice for businesses.
‍

Why Stripe + Synup?‍

Effortless Review Prompts:Harness the post-transaction momentsI to automate and optimize the dispatch of review requests, capturing customers’ fresh impressions and enhancing response rates.

Customized Review Experiences: Leverage Stripe's flexible API with Synup to cultivate customized, integrated review acquisition touchpoints within the payment process, simplifying the review process for customers and increasing engagement.

Strategic Data Utilization: Strategically utilize transactional data to craft personalized and meaningful review requests, driving higher quality feedback and fostering enhanced customer relationships.

Seamless Integration Capabilities: Stripe’s extensive integration capabilities combined with Synup’s expertise facilitate a seamless and powerful convergence of payment and review platforms, promoting a unified and efficient review management approach.

Automated, Insightful Follow-Ups: Implement automated follow-ups based on transaction data ensuring sustained and insightful customer engagement, and facilitating a consistent flow of valuable reviews.


Pairing Stripe with Synup empowers businesses to reimagine and refine the review acquisition process, aligning it meticulously with customer transactions and interactions, and driving enhanced engagement, insights, and efficiency.

How to integrate Stripe + Synup?

Stripe integration for payment processing is available to all Synup subscribers. To view and manage the integration:

  • Visit the Payment Processing tab on Synup's console.
  • Click on Connect Payment Gateway Button.
  • Select Stripe as your payment processor.
  • Authenticate your Stripe account.
  • Finish setting up payment processing.
  • Accept payments through Stripe.

‍
